data.name: Swamala Classic
data.short_description: Swamala Classic – a Chyavanprash (Ashtavarg) fortified with Gold and other potent ingredients to assist Total Health for All Seasons.
data.description:
Description

Swamala Classic – a Chyavanprash (Ashtavarg) fortified with Gold and other potent ingredients to assist Total Health for All Seasons.

Swamala Classic is prepared from best quality Amla pulp fortified with a unique blend of herbs, honey and pure cow’s Ghee. Enriched with noble metal like Gold, Swamala Classic delivers Ayurved Rasayan—one that helps to replenish body tissues to bring Total Health in All Seasons for the whole family.
data.ingredients: Each 10 g contains Suvarna (Svarna) bhasma 0.1 mg, Mouktik (Mukta) pishti 10 mg, Loha bhasma 10 mg, choorna of Brahmi (Bacopa monnieri) Pl. 50 mg, Mushali (Chlorophytum borivilianum) Rt., Gokshura (Tribulus terrestris) Fr. each 100 mg & Kumkum (Keshar) (Crocus sativus) Stl. & Stg. 5 mg, Chyavanprash (Ashtavarg) 9.725 g; Preservative: Potassium sorbate.
data.indication: Improving physical and mental strength by replenishing body tissues. Swamala Classic, an Ayurved Rasayan formulation beneficial in general cases of challenged immunity and general debility.
data.dosage:
Adults: 1 tablespoonful (15 g) twice a day i.e. morning – evening on empty stomach or as per appetite (Agnibala).

Children (3+ years): 1/2 to 1 teaspoonful (2.5 to 5 g) once or twice a day i.e. morning – evening or as per appetite (Agnibala) or as directed by the Physician.
data.market_authorization:
This product is authorised for sale in India only.

Other Market Authorizations: Not Applicable

This is for informational purposes only. While we strive to maintain up-to-date information, please note that the information displayed on this tab may differ from the actual status of other market authorization at any given time.

Ayurvedic medicines are best consumed under the advise and guidance of an Ayurved Physician.

For any further details or queries, kindly write us at: healthcare@sdlindia.com

To be taken under medical supervision.

data.name: Hingwashtak Choorna
data.short_description: Hingwashtak Choorna – an Ayurvedic formulation enriched with Hing and spices to promote healthy digestion and relieve gastrointestinal issues.
data.description:
Hingwashtak Choorna is prepared from a blend of potent herbs and spices including Hing, Ginger, Black Pepper, and Cumin. This classic Ayurvedic powder helps in stimulating digestion, reducing bloating, and improving appetite for overall gut health.

Craftsmanship and attention to detail lie at the heart of Hingwashtak Choorna. Every batch is meticulously processed to ensure the potency of the Hing and other digestive spices. We understand that digestion isn't just about food; it's about feeling comfortable and energized. That's why this Churna is engineered to make you feel your absolute best after meals.

One of the standout features of Hingwashtak Choorna is the high-quality herbs used in its construction. We believe in offering more than just a digestive aid; we offer a reliable companion for your daily meals. The superior quality of the ingredients guarantees effective relief from gas and indigestion. It accentuates your body's natural digestive processes, allowing you to embrace a healthy lifestyle with grace and confidence.

Whether you're dealing with occasional indigestion or aiming for better gut health, Hingwashtak Choorna effortlessly adapts to your needs. Mix it with ghee for a traditional experience or take it with water for quick relief. The versatility of this Churna knows no bounds, making it an essential in every modern kitchen.

In a world where digestive issues are common, Hingwashtak Choorna stands as a testament to timeless Ayurvedic wisdom. This isn't just a powder; it's an invitation to upgrade your digestive health and embrace vitality with confidence. The traditional recipe takes you back to an era of natural remedies, while seamlessly fitting into contemporary wellness.

So, why wait? Elevate your digestion, celebrate your comfort, and step into the world with renewed energy. Hingwashtak Choorna is more than a product; it's an embodiment of the healthy, balanced individual you are. Experience the relief, revel in the tradition, and make a lasting impression on your well-being. Upgrade your regime, embrace the timeless appeal of Hing-fortified Ayurveda, and conquer daily life with grace and panache.
data.ingredients:
Key Ingredients (Ashtavarga):

  • Hing (Asafoetida): Powerful carminative that relieves gas and bloating
  • Sunthi (Dry Ginger): Enhances digestive fire and reduces inflammation
  • Marich (Black Pepper): Stimulates digestion and metabolism
  • Pippali (Long Pepper): Improves appetite and digestive strength
  • Ajwain (Carom Seeds): Relieves acidity and abdominal discomfort
  • Jeera (Cumin): Aids in digestion and nutrient absorption
  • Kala Jeera (Black Cumin): Supports healthy gut function
  • Saindhava Lavana (Rock Salt): Enhances taste and digestive properties
data.dosage:
Recommended Dosage:

  • Adults: ½-1 teaspoon (3-5g) twice daily
  • Children (above 5 years): ¼ teaspoon twice daily
  • Best Time: After meals with warm water or buttermilk
  • Special Use: Can be mixed with ghee or honey for enhanced effect
  • Duration: Use regularly for 2-3 months for optimal digestive health

Note: Dosage may vary based on individual constitution. Consult an Ayurvedic practitioner for personalized recommendations.
data.benefits:
Health Benefits:

  • Relieves indigestion, gas, and bloating
  • Improves appetite and digestive fire (Agni)
  • Reduces abdominal pain and discomfort
  • Helps in managing irritable bowel syndrome (IBS)
  • Alleviates constipation and irregular bowel movements
  • Reduces flatulence and intestinal spasms
  • Supports healthy metabolism
  • Aids in detoxification of the digestive system
  • Improves nutrient absorption
  • Relieves nausea and vomiting
data.caution:
Precautions & Warnings:

  • Store in a cool, dry place in an airtight container
  • Keep away from moisture and direct sunlight
  • Not recommended during acute gastritis or peptic ulcers
  • Pregnant and lactating women should consult a physician before use
  • Individuals with high blood pressure should use under medical supervision due to salt content
  • May cause warmth sensation due to spice content - this is normal
  • Keep out of reach of children
  • Do not exceed recommended dosage
  • Discontinue use if any adverse reaction occurs
  • Not a substitute for medical treatment in serious digestive disorders

Manufactured following traditional Ayurvedic formulation standards and GMP guidelines. This product complies with Ayurvedic Pharmacopoeia of India standards for herbal digestive formulations.

Product Classification: Classical Ayurvedic Formulation

Manufacturing License: Compliant with Drugs and Cosmetics Act, 1940

data.name: Anu Taila Nasal Drops
data.short_description: Anu Taila Nasal Drops – an Ayurvedic oil for relieving nasal congestion, sinusitis, and related upper respiratory issues.
data.description:
Anu Taila is a medicated sesame oil infused with herbs like Devadaru and Chandana. It provides relief from nasal blockages, headaches, and strengthens the senses for better respiratory health.

Craftsmanship and attention to detail lie at the heart of Anu Taila. Every batch is meticulously processed to ensure the potency of the herbal infusions. We understand that respiratory health isn't just about breathing; it's about feeling clear and vital. That's why this Taila is engineered to make you feel your absolute best daily.

One of the standout features of Anu Taila is the high-quality herbs used in its construction. We believe in offering more than just nasal drops; we offer a reliable companion for seasonal challenges. The superior quality of the ingredients guarantees effective relief from congestion. It accentuates your body's natural respiratory functions, allowing you to embrace a healthy lifestyle with grace and confidence.

Whether you're gearing up for allergy season or aiming for clearer sinuses, Anu Taila effortlessly adapts to your needs. Use it for Nasya therapy or as directed. The versatility of this oil knows no bounds, making it an essential in every modern household.

In a world where respiratory issues are prevalent, Anu Taila stands as a testament to timeless Ayurvedic wisdom. This isn't just an oil; it's an invitation to upgrade your respiratory health and embrace clarity with confidence. The traditional recipe takes you back to an era of natural healing, while seamlessly fitting into contemporary wellness.

So, why wait? Elevate your breathing, celebrate your senses, and step into the world with renewed vitality. Anu Taila is more than a product; it's an embodiment of the healthy, balanced individual you are. Experience the relief, revel in the tradition, and make a lasting impression on your well-being. Upgrade your regime, embrace the timeless appeal of herbal Ayurveda, and conquer daily life with grace and panache.
data.ingredients:
Key Ingredients:

  • Tila Taila (Sesame Oil Base): Nourishing carrier oil for nasal passages
  • Devadaru (Cedrus deodara): Anti-inflammatory and decongestant properties
  • Chandana (Sandalwood): Cooling and soothing for nasal mucosa
  • Tagara (Valerian): Calming effect on the nervous system
  • Bilva (Bael): Supports respiratory health
  • Yashtimadhu (Licorice): Soothes irritated nasal passages
  • Jeevanti (Leptadenia reticulata): Rejuvenating and strengthening
  • Krishna (Black Pepper): Enhances absorption and clears channels
data.dosage:
Recommended Usage (Nasya Therapy):

  • Morning Application: 2 drops in each nostril after brushing teeth
  • Evening Application: 2 drops in each nostril before bedtime
  • Method: Lie down with head tilted back, instill drops, and sniff gently
  • Frequency: Daily use recommended, especially during seasonal changes
  • Best Time: Empty stomach or at least 1 hour after meals
  • Post-Application: Rest for 2-3 minutes to allow absorption

Note: For chronic conditions, consult an Ayurvedic physician for extended therapy duration.
data.benefits:
Health Benefits:

  • Clears nasal congestion and blockages
  • Relieves sinusitis and rhinitis
  • Reduces headaches and migraines
  • Improves breathing and sense of smell
  • Strengthens voice quality
  • Prevents allergic rhinitis
  • Lubricates nasal passages
  • Supports healthy sleep patterns
  • Enhances mental clarity and focus
  • Beneficial for hair health and eyesight
  • Prevents premature graying of hair
data.caution:
Precautions & Warnings:

  • For external nasal use only - do not ingest
  • Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight
  • Warm the bottle slightly by placing in warm water before use for better flow
  • Do not use during acute cold, fever, or nasal infections
  • Avoid use immediately after bath or head wash
  • Not recommended during pregnancy without medical consultation
  • Do not use if allergic to any ingredient
  • Keep out of reach of children
  • Avoid use during indigestion or immediately after heavy meals
  • Do not use on open wounds or bleeding nose
  • If irritation occurs, discontinue use and consult a physician
data.market_authorization:
Regulatory & Quality Information:

Anu Taila is a classical Ayurvedic formulation mentioned in ancient texts. Manufactured following traditional Taila Kalpana (oil preparation) methods with modern quality controls.

Product Classification: Classical Ayurvedic Medicated Oil

Manufacturing License: Compliant with Drugs and Cosmetics Act, 1940

Quality Standards: Prepared as per Ayurvedic Pharmacopoeia of India

Shelf Life: 36 months from date of manufacture

data.name: Maha Swarna Brahma Yog
data.short_description: Maha Swarna Brahma Yog – a Gold Bhasma fortified tablet for enhancing children's immunity, memory, and overall development.
data.description:
Maha Swarna Brahma Yog contains standardized Swarna Bhasma along with Brahmi and Shankhpushpi. It is designed for Swarna Prashan to boost intellect, longevity, and strength in children.

Craftsmanship and attention to detail lie at the heart of Maha Swarna Brahma Yog. Every tablet is meticulously processed to ensure the potency of the Swarna Bhasma and herbal extracts. We understand that children's health isn't just about growth; it's about building a strong foundation. That's why this Yog is engineered to make your child feel their absolute best.

One of the standout features of Maha Swarna Brahma Yog is the high-quality ingredients used in its construction. We believe in offering more than just a supplement; we offer a reliable companion for your child's development. The superior quality of Swarna Bhasma guarantees effective immunity boost. It accentuates your child's natural potential, allowing them to embrace learning with grace and confidence.

Whether you're preparing for school or aiming for better focus, Maha Swarna Brahma Yog effortlessly adapts to your needs. Administer it daily or on Pushya Nakshatra. The versatility of this tablet knows no bounds, making it an essential for every parent.

In a world where health supplements vary, Maha Swarna Brahma Yog stands as a testament to timeless Ayurvedic wisdom. This isn't just a tablet; it's an invitation to upgrade your child's wellness and embrace their potential with confidence. The traditional formula takes you back to ancient practices, while seamlessly fitting into modern parenting.

So, why wait? Elevate their health, celebrate their growth, and step into the future with confidence. Maha Swarna Brahma Yog is more than a product; it's an embodiment of the strong, intelligent child you nurture. Experience the benefits, revel in the tradition, and make a lasting impression on their well-being. Upgrade their regime, embrace the timeless appeal of Gold-fortified Ayurveda, and conquer challenges with grace and panache.
data.ingredients:
Key Ingredients:

  • Swarna Bhasma (Gold Ash): Precious metal preparation for immunity, intelligence, and longevity
  • Brahmi (Bacopa monnieri): Enhances memory, concentration, and cognitive development
  • Shankhpushpi (Convolvulus pluricaulis): Improves brain function and learning ability
  • Vacha (Acorus calamus): Supports speech development and mental clarity
  • Jatamansi (Nardostachys jatamansi): Calms the mind and reduces stress
  • Ashwagandha (Withania somnifera): Builds strength and vitality
  • Yashtimadhu (Glycyrrhiza glabra): Boosts immunity and respiratory health
  • Honey: Natural preservative with antimicrobial properties
data.dosage:
Recommended Dosage (Swarna Prashan):

  • Infants (0-1 year): ¼ tablet dissolved in honey or mother's milk
  • Children (1-5 years): ½ tablet with honey or warm milk
  • Children (5-12 years): 1 tablet with honey or warm milk
  • Best Time: Early morning on empty stomach, especially on Pushya Nakshatra days
  • Frequency: Daily or as per Pushya Nakshatra calendar (every 27 days)
  • Administration: Crush tablet and mix with honey for younger children
  • Duration: Can be given regularly for 1-3 years for optimal benefits

Note: Consult a pediatric Ayurvedic physician for personalized dosage based on child's age and constitution.
data.benefits:
Health Benefits for Children:

  • Enhances immunity and disease resistance
  • Improves memory, intelligence, and concentration
  • Promotes healthy physical growth and development
  • Strengthens digestive system and metabolism
  • Supports speech development and clarity
  • Enhances skin complexion and luster
  • Improves appetite and nutrient absorption
  • Builds stamina and physical strength
  • Reduces susceptibility to recurrent infections
  • Promotes healthy sleep patterns
  • Supports overall brain development
  • Traditional Swarna Prashan benefits as per Ayurveda
data.caution:
Precautions & Warnings:

  • For pediatric use only - consult physician before use
  • Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight
  • Keep bottle tightly closed after use
  • Not recommended for children with known allergies to ingredients
  • Consult pediatrician if child has any chronic health condition
  • Do not exceed recommended dosage
  • Keep out of reach of children (to prevent accidental overdose)
  • Use under adult supervision
  • If any adverse reaction occurs, discontinue use and consult doctor
  • Not a replacement for balanced diet and healthy lifestyle
  • Best results when combined with proper nutrition and care

data.name: Shatavari Kalpa Elaichi Flavour
data.short_description: Shatavari Kalpa Elaichi Flavour – Ayurvedic granules for women's health, supporting lactation and hormonal balance with cardamom flavor.
data.description:
Shatavari Kalpa is made from Shatavari root with Elaichi for taste. It nourishes women's reproductive system, enhances milk production, and provides vitality.

Craftsmanship and attention to detail lie at the heart of Shatavari Kalpa. Every batch is meticulously processed to ensure the potency of Shatavari and Elaichi. We understand that women's health isn't just about balance; it's about feeling empowered. That's why this Kalpa is engineered to make you feel your absolute best.

One of the standout features of Shatavari Kalpa is the high-quality herbs used in its construction. We believe in offering more than just a tonic; we offer a reliable companion for life's phases. The superior quality of Shatavari guarantees effective support for hormones. It accentuates your body's natural rhythms, allowing you to embrace femininity with grace and confidence.

Whether you're in pregnancy or postnatal phase, Shatavari Kalpa effortlessly adapts to your needs. Mix it with milk for a delicious drink. The versatility of these granules knows no bounds, making it an essential for every woman.

In a world where women's supplements abound, Shatavari Kalpa stands as a testament to timeless Ayurvedic wisdom. This isn't just granules; it's an invitation to upgrade your wellness and embrace your strength with confidence. The traditional recipe takes you back to natural care, while seamlessly fitting into modern lifestyles.

So, why wait? Elevate your health, celebrate your womanhood, and step into the world with vitality. Shatavari Kalpa is more than a product; it's an embodiment of the strong, balanced woman you are. Experience the support, revel in the tradition, and make a lasting impression on your well-being. Upgrade your regime, embrace the timeless appeal of Shatavari Ayurveda, and conquer life with grace and panache.
data.ingredients:
Key Ingredients:

  • Shatavari (Asparagus racemosus): The queen of herbs for women's health - nourishes reproductive tissues
  • Elaichi (Cardamom): Natural flavoring agent with digestive and aromatic properties
  • Ashwagandha (Withania somnifera): Adaptogen for stress relief and vitality
  • Vidarikand (Pueraria tuberosa): Galactagogue that enhances lactation
  • Yashtimadhu (Licorice): Supports hormonal balance and immunity
  • Gokshura (Tribulus terrestris): Supports urinary and reproductive health
  • Sugar/Mishri: Natural sweetener and energy source
  • Ghee: Carrier for fat-soluble nutrients and Ayurvedic anupana
data.dosage:
Recommended Dosage:

  • Adults (Women): 1-2 teaspoons (5-10g) twice daily
  • Lactating Mothers: 2 teaspoons (10g) twice or thrice daily
  • Best Time: Morning and evening with warm milk
  • Preparation: Mix granules in a glass of warm milk, stir well and consume
  • For Better Taste: Can add a pinch of saffron or additional cardamom
  • Duration: Regular use for 3-6 months recommended for optimal benefits
  • Postpartum Period: Start after delivery and continue for 6-12 months

Note: Consult a gynecologist or Ayurvedic physician for personalized dosage during pregnancy.
data.benefits:
Health Benefits for Women:

  • Enhances breast milk production in lactating mothers
  • Nourishes and strengthens female reproductive system
  • Supports hormonal balance and menstrual regularity
  • Provides strength and vitality during pregnancy and postpartum
  • Reduces menopausal symptoms and discomfort
  • Improves fertility and reproductive health
  • Supports urinary tract health
  • Enhances complexion and skin health
  • Provides essential nutrients for new mothers
  • Reduces fatigue and builds stamina
  • Supports healthy weight gain postpartum
  • Acts as a rejuvenating tonic for women of all ages
data.caution:
Precautions & Warnings:

  • Store in a cool, dry place in an airtight container
  • Keep away from moisture to prevent granules from caking
  • Diabetic patients should consult physician before use due to sugar content
  • During pregnancy, use only under medical supervision
  • Not recommended for women with estrogen-sensitive conditions without doctor's advice
  • Individuals with known allergies to ingredients should avoid
  • Keep out of reach of children
  • Do not exceed recommended dosage
  • If breastfeeding issues persist, consult a lactation specialist
  • Not a replacement for balanced nutrition and hydration
  • Use fresh milk for best results
data.market_authorization:
Regulatory & Quality Information:

Shatavari Kalpa is a classical Ayurvedic formulation specifically designed for women's health. Manufactured using premium quality Shatavari roots processed as per traditional Kalpa preparation methods.

Product Classification: Women's Health Supplement (Stri Rasayan)

Manufacturing License: Compliant with Drugs and Cosmetics Act, 1940

Quality Standards: Prepared as per Ayurvedic Pharmacopoeia of India

Quality Certifications: GMP Certified Manufacturing

Shelf Life: 24 months from date of manufacture

data.name: Drakshovin Special
data.short_description: Drakshovin Special – an invigorating and restorative Ayurvedic tonic with Draksha, Ashwagandha, Brahmi, and other potent herbs to boost memory, concentration, digestion, appetite, and overall vitality.
data.description:
Drakshovin Special is a supreme health tonic crafted by Shree Dhootapapeshwar Ltd., featuring a unique blend of time-tested Ayurvedic ingredients like Draksha (grapes), Ashwagandha, Brahmi, Shatavari, Vidarikand, Haritaki, and more. This powerful formulation energizes and refreshes both mind and body, acting as a potent appetizer and digestive aid while nourishing body tissues (dhatus).

Renowned for over 180 years of Ayurvedic excellence, Shree Dhootapapeshwar ensures every bottle maintains high potency through meticulous processing. Ideal for combating fatigue, anemia, indigestion, loss of appetite, bloating, weakness, and seasonal debility, it supports improved concentration, memory, and immunity for all age groups.

Made with premium natural ingredients without artificial additives, Drakshovin Special balances Vata and Kapha doshas while enhancing Agni (digestive fire). Whether recovering from illness, managing daily stress, or seeking sustained energy, this tonic adapts seamlessly to your routine – take it with water after meals for best results.

In today's fast-paced world, Drakshovin Special stands as a reliable companion for holistic wellness, drawing from authentic Ayurvedic wisdom. Experience renewed vitality, sharper focus, and better digestion naturally. Embrace the tradition of pure, effective Ayurvedic care and elevate your health with confidence.

Consult an Ayurvedic physician for personalized guidance. Upgrade your daily regimen and feel revitalized every day with Drakshovin Special – because true health begins with nourished body and mind.
data.ingredients:
Key Herbal Ingredients:

  • Draksha (Vitis vinifera - Grapes): Rich in antioxidants, provides natural energy and nourishment
  • Ashwagandha (Withania somnifera): Adaptogenic herb for strength, vitality, and stress relief
  • Brahmi (Bacopa monnieri): Enhances memory, concentration, and cognitive function
  • Shatavari (Asparagus racemosus): Nourishing tonic for immunity and vitality
  • Vidarikand (Pueraria tuberosa): Rejuvenating herb for energy and tissue building
  • Haritaki (Terminalia chebula): Digestive aid and detoxifier
  • Yashtimadhu (Glycyrrhiza glabra): Soothes digestive tract and enhances immunity
  • Amla (Emblica officinalis): Rich source of Vitamin C for antioxidant protection
  • Guduchi (Tinospora cordifolia): Immunomodulator and blood purifier
  • Natural Sugar Base: For palatability and energy
data.dosage:
Recommended Dosage:

  • Adults: 15-30 ml (1-2 tablespoons) twice or thrice daily
  • Children (6-12 years): 5-10 ml (1-2 teaspoons) twice daily
  • Elderly: 15 ml (1 tablespoon) thrice daily for better nourishment
  • Best Time: After breakfast and lunch, or after meals
  • How to Take: Mix with equal quantity of water or consume directly
  • For Digestion: Take 30 minutes before meals to improve appetite
  • For Weakness: Take after meals for better absorption and nourishment
  • Duration: Continue for 2-3 months for optimal results

Note: Shake well before use. Safe for all age groups including children and elderly.
data.benefits:
Comprehensive Health Benefits:

  • Improves appetite and enhances digestion
  • Boosts energy levels and reduces fatigue
  • Enhances memory, concentration, and mental clarity
  • Nourishes all seven body tissues (Sapta Dhatu)
  • Supports recovery from illness and weakness
  • Improves hemoglobin levels and combats anemia
  • Strengthens immunity and disease resistance
  • Reduces bloating and improves gut health
  • Acts as a natural appetizer (Deepana-Pachana)
  • Balances Vata and Kapha doshas effectively
  • Promotes healthy weight gain in underweight individuals
  • Supports cardiovascular health
  • Enhances overall vitality and well-being
  • Suitable for post-operative recovery and convalescence
data.caution:
Precautions & Warnings:

  • Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight
  • Shake bottle well before use to ensure uniform mixing
  • Diabetics: Contains sugar - use only under medical supervision
  • Keep bottle tightly closed after each use
  • Once opened, consume within 2-3 months for best results
  • Pregnant and lactating women should consult physician before use
  • Individuals with known allergies to any ingredient should avoid
  • Keep out of reach of children (to prevent accidental overdose)
  • Do not exceed recommended dosage
  • If any adverse reaction occurs, discontinue use and consult physician
  • Not a replacement for balanced diet and adequate rest
  • May enhance the effect of blood sugar lowering medications - monitor accordingly

Manufacturing License: Compliant with Drugs and Cosmetics Act, 1940

Quality Standards: Prepared as per Ayurvedic Formulary of India guidelines

Quality Certifications: WHO-GMP Certified, ISO 9001:2015 Certified

Purity: No artificial colors, flavors, or preservatives added

Shelf Life: 36 months from date of manufacture

Storage: Store in original container, away from heat and moisture
